summary: campaign-C Task 4 (per-probe pages) PASS (9/10, ready) at round 2. Built 7 per-probe HTML pages at the canonical filenames (probe-ig, probe-club, probe-vcap, probe-j, probe-bhattacharyya-fano, probe-sdl, probe-shared-spectral-capacity), each with Algorithm / Method / Rationale + a Plaintext-reference block + a compliant .diagram-frame (trust zones, boundary, numbered sequence, both measurement-loop arms, defense locus, every arrow labeled). Wired the full 8-entry probes navgroup into every page's topnav, linked the registry §02 table + footer and the index card to the 7 pages, and added id anchors to the synthesis §02 overview rows with each probe page deep-linking its representative row. V_cap absorbs the relocated estimator-repair methodology (shuffle floor -49.7 -> -1.9 bits via PCA capacity-matching; Lemma 1 / Prop 2 / Prop 3; accuracy-primary/bits-auxiliary). SDL and shared-spectral-capacity carry explicit 'queued onto Task 7' placeholders (no plaintext-across-layers on disk); the queue file refine-logs/probe-pages/queued-for-utility.md lists both emissions. Round-1 blockers fixed: (W1) probe-j plaintext numbers corrected to the real kv-accumulation family means 280.3/47.0/3.56 bits (c2_robustness.json), the 1044.7/1.47 KV-Cloak values kept only in Rationale; (W2) removed the cross-arm Spearman arrow on the V_cap diagram (probe never reads attack output); (W3) every arrow now labeled on all diagrams; (W4b) synthesis row anchors added; (W5) removed iGPU mention + spikes path. Rebuttals on claim-as-<code> citation, masthead/SVG em-dashes, inline h4 styles, and the max_rows estimator cap all SUSTAINED (match the accepted vec2text.html / probes-registry.html house exemplar; em-dash rule is prose-scoped and prose has zero em-dashes). No GPU, no new claim node.
